MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debora Golshani Associate of Michael Burstein appeared by telephone for Joyce Thigpen.

Ms. Golshani stated that a supplement regarding statutory Administrator's fees was mailed to the Court and that notice of the supplement was not provided. The Court stated that different relief was being requested and that it may require an amended petition. The matter was continued to June 21, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice. Ms. Golshani will appear by Court Call.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
